experiments.reason: Bigger SentencePiece vocabulary may reduce byte-level entropy; FACTORIZED_EMB_DIM=128 prevents V*d embedding cost from eating the cap.

result.reason: Crashed before training: factorized tied logits used emb_proj.weight with wrong orientation; fixed with emb_proj.weight.T and queued R33A2.

experiments.reason: Late-only gentle slice. Train full width until 85% wallclock, then alternate 1.0/0.975 and export 0.975. Manual unblock after R35A review.
Layer-subset export: slice early MLP layers 0-7 only, keep late layers 8-10 full because late layers likely quality-critical. Manual unblock after R35A review.
MatFormer regularizer only: train width dropout but export full MLP. No byte saving goal; must beat R14 quality. Manual unblock after R35A review.
Export-only exact ReLU2 MLP equalization. Scale fc rows by s and proj columns by 1/s^2 using proj column RMS alpha=0.50. No capacity loss.

experiments.reason: Reproduce the merged OpenAI PR #1060 stack on existing SP1024 data: coprime-stride multi-shard loader, XSA on all 11 layers, BigramHash(2816x112), full Hessian GPTQ, LZMA artifact, and no TTT. Public record was 1.1122 BPB / ~15.98MB.

Apply the current SP8192 LegalTTT discovery (#1812: score-first 4-epoch TTT) to the reproduced upstream #1060 SP1024+FullGPTQ parent. This tests eval-time adaptation on the new 1.11185 BPB base, not the old R14 branch.

Apply the recent QK-Gain 5.25 signal from Scylla/SP8192 records (#1813/#1812) to the upstream #1060 SP1024 parent without TTT, isolating train-time architecture effect before combining with adaptation.

Combine the two strongest immediately runnable discoveries on the reproduced #1060 parent: QK-Gain 5.25 plus score-first LegalTTT 4 epochs. This is the bridge run while Scylla/SP8192 data prep is handled separately.
